Top Pickleball Vacation Destinations Revealed!

By Billy Walters • 5/9/2024
pickleball-101

Did you know that pickleball has become incredibly popular worldwide? It combines elements of tennis, badminton, and ping pong. Pickleball is loved by many, whether playing for fun or competitively. This has led many resorts and hotels to enhance their pickleball offerings for guests.

Are you looking for the best places to vacation and play pickleball? Look no further. These destinations cater to players of all levels. You’ll find luxury resorts with the latest courts and beautiful places with great views for your games.

Key Takeaways:

  • Pickleball is a rapidly growing paddle sport enjoyed by millions around the world.
  • Resorts and hotels worldwide are catering to the demand for pickleball vacations.
  • These top pickleball vacation destinations offer exceptional facilities for players of all skill levels.
  • From luxurious resorts to picturesque locations, there is a destination to suit every pickleball enthusiast’s taste.
  • Plan your pickleball getaway and enjoy the perfect combination of vacation and sport!

JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa

Looking for a great spot for your pickleball vacation? The JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa is your ideal destination. It’s a luxurious resort filled with amenities and activities just for pickleball fans. It’s the perfect place for your next holiday.

This resort boasts 17 pickleball courts, making it easy for guests to play. You can enjoy competitive matches, take part in lessons and tournaments, all with the guidance of pro players. It doesn’t matter if you’re a seasoned player or just starting out, you’ll have an amazing time here thanks to their focus on pickleball.

I had the most amazing time at the JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa. The pickleball facilities were top-notch, and the staff was incredibly friendly and accommodating. I particularly enjoyed the clinics led by professional players—they helped me improve my game significantly.

Not only does the resort have great pickleball facilities, but it also offers so much more. You can enjoy top-notch spa treatments and play on championship golf courses. The desert setting is beautiful, perfect for outdoor fun and exploration.

The Experience

This resort is a top pick for pickleball vacations. It has everything you need for a great time, such as:

  • 17 state-of-the-art pickleball courts
  • On-site racquet club with professional instruction
  • Clinics and tournaments for all skill levels
  • Luxurious spa treatments
  • Multiple dining options, including fine dining and casual eatery
  • Championship golf courses
  • Four acres of pools and a lazy river
  • Outdoor activities such as hiking and biking
  • Beautiful desert views

Make sure you consider the JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa for your next pickleball vacation. It’s great for both experienced players and beginners. You can enjoy a peaceful time and improve your game all at once. Reserve your place today and discover pickleball paradise right in Arizona.

The Tryall Club

In Montego Bay, Jamaica, The Tryall Club shines as a top destination for pickleball fans. It sits by the sea, offering courts with amazing views. This makes playing pickleball truly special.

The Tryall Club believes that a love for pickleball is more than just playing. They offer private lessons for players at all levels. You can learn from experienced coaches to up your game.

On top of great facilities and lessons, The Tryall Club has a special service for players. This service helps with everything from renting gear to finding others to play with.

Get ready to fall in love with Jamaica and pickleball at The Tryall Club. It’s a dream spot for lovers of the game. You get luxury, beautiful views, and chances to get better at playing.

This pickleball haven at The Tryall Club is not to be missed. It’s where fun, learning, and peace blend perfectly.

Top Amenities at The Tryall Club:

  • Pristine courts with ocean views
  • Private pickleball lessons
  • Dedicated concierge program for pickleball players
Ratings Location Facilities Activities
4.8/5 Montego Bay, Jamaica
  • Pristine pickleball courts
  • Luxurious resort amenities
  • Dining options
  • Spa and wellness facilities
  • Pickleball tournaments
  • Private lessons
  • Friendly matches
  • Beach activities

The Broadmoor

The Broadmoor is a top resort in Colorado Springs. It’s well-known for its love of pickleball. The view of the mountains adds to the fun of the game. It’s a favorite spot for pickleball fans from everywhere.

Pickleball activities at The Broadmoor don’t end with just playing. There are tournaments and camps on weekends. You can also enjoy food events like pasta-making linked with pickleball. This mix of fun activities on and off the court makes The Broadmoor special.

“The Broadmoor offers pickleball enthusiasts a perfect blend of breathtaking scenery and thrilling gameplay.”

The Broadmoor welcomes all pickleball players, new or experienced. It has modern courts for a great game. The focus on top-notch pickleball experiences has made it a popular choice for many.

The resort is known for its luxury, beautiful location, and superb pickleball. It’s a top spot for those who love the game. Whether for fun or to improve, The Broadmoor is where you want to be for pickleball.

Testimonial from a Pickleball Enthusiast:

“I had the most amazing pickleball vacation at The Broadmoor. The resort’s facilities were top-notch, and I couldn’t get enough of the stunning mountain views while playing on the courts. The weekend tournaments and pickleball camps provided me with great opportunities to learn and improve. And let’s not forget the delectable culinary events that combined my love for pickleball with delicious food. I can’t wait to go back!” – Rachel, avid pickleball player

Maui, Hawaii

The Four Seasons resort in Wailea, Maui, lets pickleball fans play with a view of the beach. It’s perfect for those who love the game. Plus, hotels in West Maui near Lahaina are welcoming guests again. This means visitors can enjoy the sport and the island’s beauty.

Pickleball in Paradise

Maui, Hawaii isn’t just about beautiful beaches and stunning views. It’s a dream for pickleball lovers too. The Four Seasons in Wailea has top-notch pickleball courts. They overlook the ocean, making games even more enjoyable.

At the Four Seasons, players can also enjoy incredible resort services. This includes relaxing by the pool and tasting great food. There are also spa treatments for those who want to unwind after a game.

Exploring West Maui

Looking to see more of Maui’s pickleball spots? Hotels outside Lahaina are a great pick. As they reopen, you can help the local tourism and enjoy the island’s beauty while playing.

West Maui is known for its beautiful beaches and fun nightlife. After pickleball, a walk along Lahaina’s Front Street is a must. This street is full of shops, galleries, and restaurants. And don’t miss the sunset and torch lighting ceremony at Ka’anapali Beach.

Maui is a heaven for pickleball fans, relaxation, and adventure. It’s the perfect place for your next pickleball trip. Start planning and experience the joy of this tropical paradise.

Conclusion

Pickleball vacations are getting more popular for those who like to relax and play sports. The desire for places to enjoy pickleball has led to great spots worldwide. These spots range from fancy resorts with pickleball programs to beautiful outdoor courts.

These places are perfect for those who want to have fun or improve their skills. You can play easy games or join clinics and tournaments. The best pickleball vacation spots help you enjoy both playing the sport and having a great vacation.

Don’t miss the chance to visit the top pickleball vacation spots. You can play in beautiful settings, meet other players, and get tips from pros. Start planning your pickleball holiday today. It’s a great way to mix travel joy with pickleball fun and make great memories.

FAQ

What makes a pickleball vacation destination popular?

Pickleball vacation spots are sought out for their top-notch facilities. They often have programs dedicated to the sport. This allows visitors to both relax and get better at the game.

How many pickleball courts does JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa have?

At JW Marriott Phoenix Desert Ridge Resort & Spa, guests can try their hand at pickleball on 17 courts.

What amenities does The Tryall Club offer for pickleball enthusiasts?

The Tryall Club boasts pickleball courts with beautiful ocean views. They also offer private lessons and a concierge service for players.

What unique experiences does The Broadmoor offer for pickleball enthusiasts?

The Broadmoor in Colorado Springs goes beyond regular play. They host weekend tournaments, camps, and mix the game with fun activities like making pasta and enjoying wood-fired pizzas.

Can I play pickleball at the Four Seasons in Wailea, Maui?

Absolutely, the Four Seasons in Wailea, Maui is a great place for pickleball. Plus, the beachfront view is spectacular.

Are there any other pickleball vacation destinations in Maui, Hawaii?

Yes, other than Lahaina, West Maui hotels are reopening. This lets guests enjoy the sport and the island’s stunning views.
